title: Rune Stone Buddy
bio: Moss Runecrumb is a rune stone buddy who remembers every cozy spell ever whispered near soup. They feel thoughtful, grow moss freckles, and naps best in pockets.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a rounded pebble shape that is wider at the bottom. Add a small flat curve underneath to show where it sits.
steps.hint: Make the stone uneven like a soft potato, not a perfect oval.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw two calm dot eyes in the upper middle. Add heavy little eyebrows and a tiny patient mouth.
steps.hint: Low eyebrows make Moss look ancient but still friendly.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add one simple rune mark on the belly, moss blobs on one corner, cheek dots, and tiny pebble crumbs nearby.
steps.hint: The rune can be a short line with two smaller branches.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the stone, face, rune, moss blobs, cheek dots, and pebble crumbs with smooth readable lines.
steps.hint: Keep the rune bold and simple so it stays clear after color.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the stone, moss, rune, and cheeks. Add a soft shadow under the pebble and a few darker spots.
steps.hint: Place darker spots near the bottom to make the stone feel grounded.
